epigraph.quote: Reminiscient nostalgic smells from azaleas playing hide-and-seek in the garden.

per_stop.quote: Lovely old small theatre with minstrel's gallery & high stage, dark brown velvet curtains.
We spent the night at The Anchor Pub, near Welland, + had a drink at the pub.
Each blade 16 m. long. Each windmill produces enough electricity for 300 homes.
gorgeous turquoise sea with white crests
St. Just has an old, grass-covered circle/ amphitheatre where Mystery Plays were performed
Our evening campsite is called Bosavern. We are camped in a beautiful lawned garden.
had a bad cup of coffee & bought cakes at a frigid, Snooty cake-shop
we were charged £6 for looking at the sea
One of the prettiest places we've seen, with nice looking chalets. The mill race runs beside the campsite.
I had a cream tea for elevenses.
Reminiscient nostalgic smells from azaleas playing hide-and-seek in the garden.
We drove east + ended up having a good supper at the Stag at Liskeard
